results.scenario: Balanced lunch for an office worker

suggestions.name: Grilled Chicken & Brown Rice Bowl
suggestions.description: A protein-packed lunch featuring grilled chicken breast with seasoned brown rice, steamed broccoli, and a light drizzle of olive oil. Perfect for sustained energy throughout the afternoon.

suggestions.name: Turkey & Quinoa Power Bowl
suggestions.description: Lean ground turkey sautéed with quinoa, bell peppers, and spinach. A nutrient-dense meal that's quick to prepare and keeps you full without being heavy.

suggestions.name: Tuna Salad Sandwich with Sweet Potato
suggestions.description: A classic tuna salad made with whole wheat bread, paired with roasted sweet potato fries. Combines lean protein with complex carbs for a satisfying lunch.

results.scenario: Evening meal, need high protein to hit daily target

suggestions.name: Grilled Chicken Breast with Sweet Potato & Broccoli
suggestions.description: Lean protein-packed dinner with complex carbs and roasted vegetables. The sweet potato provides sustained energy while broccoli adds micronutrients and fiber.
ingredients: Broccoli (250g), roasted with 1 tsp olive oil
Sea salt and black pepper to taste

suggestions.name: Turkey & Quinoa Power Bowl
suggestions.description: High-protein grain bowl loaded with lean ground turkey, quinoa, and colorful vegetables. Perfect for post-workout nutrition with balanced macros.

suggestions.name: Salmon Fillet with Brown Rice & Asparagus
suggestions.description: Omega-3 rich salmon paired with whole grains and asparagus. The healthy fats support recovery and hormone health while meeting protein goals.
ingredients: Fresh asparagus (300g), sautéed with 1 tsp olive oil
Lemon juice and herbs for seasoning

results.scenario: Light snack to close out the day under budget

suggestions.name: Greek Yogurt Protein Bowl
suggestions.description: High-protein yogurt snack with fresh berries and granola, providing excellent satiety with minimal fat

suggestions.name: Protein Smoothie
suggestions.description: Quick and convenient protein shake with banana and almond butter, balanced macros for post-workout recovery

suggestions.name: Protein Energy Bites & Apple
suggestions.description: No-bake protein-packed snack with an apple for added fiber and natural sweetness

results.scenario: Vegetarian needing to hit protein without meat

suggestions.name: Mediterranean Chickpea Buddha Bowl
suggestions.description: A nutrient-dense vegetarian bowl featuring roasted chickpeas, quinoa, fresh vegetables, and tahini dressing. Perfect for a satisfying dinner that supports muscle recovery.

suggestions.name: Spinach and Feta Pasta Primavera
suggestions.description: Whole wheat pasta tossed with sautéed seasonal vegetables, protein-rich spinach, and crumbled feta cheese. A comforting yet balanced dinner option.
ingredients: 1 cup mixed vegetables (zucchini, bell peppers, mushrooms)
Lemon juice and black pepper to taste

suggestions.name: Black Bean and Sweet Potato Tacos
suggestions.description: Seasoned black bean and roasted sweet potato tacos with fresh toppings. A protein-packed, satisfying dinner with excellent micronutrient content.

suggestions.name: Greek Yogurt Protein Parfait
suggestions.description: Quick and filling breakfast with creamy Greek yogurt layered with granola and berries. Perfect for grabbing on the go.

suggestions.name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
suggestions.description: Simple yet satisfying whole grain toast topped with natural peanut butter and fresh banana slices. Ready in 3 minutes.

suggestions.name: Veggie Egg Scramble with Toast
suggestions.description: Quick scrambled eggs packed with vegetables, served with whole grain toast. Nutrient-dense and ready in 8 minutes.

suggestions.name: Grilled Mediterranean Chicken with Quinoa
suggestions.description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken breast served with fluffy quinoa pilaf, roasted vegetables, and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil. A protein-rich, balanced meal with healthy fats from olive oil.

suggestions.name: Baked White Fish with Farro & Roasted Vegetables
suggestions.description: Mediterranean-style baked white fish topped with lemon and herbs, served alongside hearty farro grain and a medley of roasted bell peppers, eggplant, and tomatoes with olive oil.
ingredients: White fish fillet - sea bass or halibut (160g)

suggestions.name: Mediterranean Chickpea & Spinach Bowl
suggestions.description: Hearty vegetarian bowl featuring seasoned roasted chickpeas, fresh spinach, tomatoes, and cucumber, tossed with extra virgin olive oil, feta cheese, and finished with fresh herbs. Perfect plant-based protein source.

suggestions.name: Grilled Chicken & Sweet Potato Bowl
suggestions.description: A classic post-workout meal combining lean protein with complex carbs for glycogen replenishment. Features grilled chicken breast, roasted sweet potato, broccoli, and a drizzle of olive oil.

suggestions.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait with Granola & Berries
suggestions.description: A lighter option ideal for post-workout recovery. Greek yogurt provides protein and probiotics, while granola and berries offer fast-digesting carbs and antioxidants for muscle recovery.

suggestions.name: Turkey & Whole Grain Pasta with Marinara
suggestions.description: A satisfying post-workout meal with lean ground turkey for quick-absorbing protein and whole grain pasta for sustained carb replenishment. Marinara sauce adds flavor and antioxidants.

results.scenario: Very little budget left, something satisfying but tiny

suggestions.name: Greek Yogurt & Berries Parfait
suggestions.description: Light and protein-rich snack with creamy Greek yogurt layered with fresh berries and a drizzle of honey for natural sweetness

suggestions.name: Turkey & Vegetables Lettuce Wrap
suggestions.description: Fresh and satisfying wrap using crispy lettuce leaves instead of bread, filled with lean turkey and crunchy vegetables

suggestions.name: Egg White & Veggie Scramble
suggestions.description: Quick and easy scrambled egg whites with sautéed bell peppers and spinach, seasoned with herbs for flavor without extra calories
ingredients: Black pepper & garlic powder to taste

results.scenario: Bulking phase, lots of calories remaining

suggestions.name: Grilled Chicken Breast with Sweet Potato and Broccoli
suggestions.description: A classic, balanced meal featuring a lean protein source paired with complex carbs and nutrient-dense vegetables. Perfect for muscle recovery and sustained energy.

suggestions.name: Salmon Fillet with Quinoa and Asparagus
suggestions.description: A nutrient-rich meal combining omega-3 rich salmon with complete-protein quinoa and fresh asparagus. Excellent for inflammation reduction and overall health.

suggestions.name: Turkey and Veggie Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
suggestions.description: A flavorful, quick-to-prepare meal with lean ground turkey, mixed vegetables, and whole grain rice. Great for busy days and packed with nutrients.
ingredients: Mixed vegetables: bell peppers (100g), snap peas (80g), carrots (80g)

suggestions.name: Grilled Salmon with Garlic Butter and Asparagus
suggestions.description: A rich, protein-packed keto meal featuring omega-3 loaded salmon topped with herb garlic butter, paired with sautéed asparagus. Perfect for finishing a day on keto.

suggestions.name: Creamy Egg Salad with Bacon and Celery
suggestions.description: A satisfying, creamy egg salad loaded with crispy bacon pieces and fresh celery. Made with full-fat mayo for authentic keto flavor without the carb load.
ingredients: Salt, pepper, and paprika to taste

suggestions.name: Beef and Cream Cheese Steak Bites
suggestions.description: Tender, juicy steak cubes pan-seared and coated in a rich cream cheese and herb sauce. Ultra-low carb comfort food that hits all your macro targets.
